title: collinsia parviflora var. minima
intro: Collinsia parviflora var. minima, also known as Dwarf Blue Sage, is a plant species within the plantain family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing digestive problems. Collinsia parviflora var. minima can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies due to its potential to promote overall well-being.
